teachingPoint: T186 DataRetentionEnforcer execution order is MANDATORY AND INVIOLABLE: (1) legal hold check → (2) approval token → (3) governance → (4) purge+emit DataPurged with tombstoneRef ONLY. Skipping or reordering step 1 permanently deletes legally protected content.
keywords: data retention enforcer execution order mandatory inviolable legal hold approval token governance purge tombstoneRef prohibited fields ContentRetentionExtended F424 PLATFORM-ONLY
ironRules: EXECUTION ORDER IS MANDATORY AND INVIOLABLE: step 1=legal hold → step 2=approval token → step 3=governance → step 4=purge+emit
Step 1: ILegalHoldService.check() — if holdStatus.active === true: emit ContentRetentionExtended, return IMMEDIATELY. Do not proceed to step 2.
Step 2: IApprovalService.validate() — if token missing/invalid/expired: reject without purging, return.
Step 3: F424 IDataGovernanceService.enforceRetention() — get purge decision from governance (PLATFORM-ONLY).
Step 4: Execute purge — emit DataPurged with tombstoneRef ONLY. PROHIBITED fields: rawContent, content, payload, body, data.
F424 IDataGovernanceService is PLATFORM-ONLY — governance policies not tenant-editable.
F425 IWarehouseAuditService MUST record every purge attempt including rejected ones.
